title: Prime Palindrome
hints: Check numbers sequentially starting from N, but verify if a number is a palindrome before testing for primality to save time.
Most prime palindromes have an odd number of digits. Generating palindromes by mirroring the first half of digits is much faster than checking every integer.
Focus on generating palindromes with 1, 3, 5, 7, and 9 digits. For each generated palindrome, check if it is prime and greater than or equal to N.
